top_signals.title: Zijin’s $4B acquisition of Allied Gold faces delay in China: FT
top_signals.summary: According to the FT, Chinese regulators are having doubts over the premium that Zijin is paying and jurisdiction risks associated with Allied's assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The daughter of Thailand's beer billionaire says she never doubted women belonged at the top
top_signals.summary: Thapanee Techajareonvikul reflects on family, succession and leadership inside the billionaire empire behind Chang beer, Big C and Singapore beverage giant Fraser & Neave.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Australian Commissions HMAS Eyre
top_signals.summary: The Royal Australian Navy commissioned HMAS Eyre into the fleet in a ceremony at HMAS Stirling in Western Australia.HMAS Eyre is the second of six planned Arafura class offshore patrol vessels (OPV) to enter service, following the commissioning…
